content.speakerText: So far, we're 85% on track—delayed a bit on the UX phase, but dev's caught up.
content.speakerTextCn: 目前我们进度85%，UI/UX稍有延迟，但开发团队已经追回来了。

options.text: We're behind schedule and can't catch up.
We're ahead on backend delivery and hit all sprint goals. UX delay was minor and already mitigated.
The project is canceled due to delays.
We didn't start the UX phase yet.

content.explanation: 正确答案强调了用数据支撑进度（85% on track），并突出解决问题的能力（delay was minor and already mitigated）。干扰项1和3是消极回应，不符合积极汇报的语境；干扰项4与对话内容矛盾，因为UX阶段已启动但延迟。

content.speakerText: Can you give me a quick update on the Q3 product rollout?
content.speakerTextCn: 你能简要汇报一下Q3产品上线的进展吗？

options.text: I think maybe it's going okay?
We've completed all core features ahead of schedule, and user testing is on track for next week.
I'm not sure, ask the marketing team.
The project is too big to update right now.

content.explanation: 正确答案使用了具体成果（completed all core features ahead of schedule）和进度说明（on track），符合进度汇报的专业标准。干扰项1和3缺乏信息量，干扰项4推卸责任，都不符合高效汇报的要求。

content.speakerText: How’s the migration to the new cloud platform going?
content.speakerTextCn: 迁移到新云平台的进展如何？

options.text: It’s been a disaster so far.
We're 90% complete with the migration, and no critical issues have arisen so far.
I don't know anything about cloud platforms.
We started last month, but nothing’s done yet.

content.explanation: 正确答案使用了量化数据（90% complete）和风险控制信息（no critical issues），体现专业汇报素养。干扰项1过于负面，干扰项3和4缺乏基本责任感，不符合职场沟通规范。
